description: Triggers when the user is receiving code review feedback and needs guidance on how to respond — covers technical verification, handling unclear feedback, and when to push back
should_trigger: I got code review feedback and the reviewer says to add metrics tracking — but nothing calls that endpoint
How should I respond to code review comments without being sycophantic?
A reviewer suggested removing legacy code but I think it's needed for backward compatibility — how do I push back?
My reviewer gave me 6 items to fix but items 4 and 5 are unclear — what do I do?
How do I handle external reviewer feedback that conflicts with my architect's decisions?
The reviewer is technically wrong about this implementation — how do I respond?
should_not_trigger: How do I request a code review before merging?
Write unit tests for this function
Refactor this component to use hooks
